name: paraloncloud-rentals
description: Enables MCP clients to rent GPUs from ParalonCloud using natural language, including browsing available GPUs, starting and stopping rentals, and retrieving connection URLs.

name: TickTest MCP Server
description: Enables AI agents to perform A-share quantitative backtesting by calling TickTest API through MCP protocol.

name: course-mcp
description: A local MCP server for referencing course files from a configured classes directory, allowing listing courses and their files safely.

name: Charlotte-Mecklenburg MCP Server
description: An MCP server that exposes Charlotte, NC and Mecklenburg County open data as tools for an LLM agent, enabling queries about trash pickup, parcels, zoning, crime, and more by geocoding addresses and querying live ArcGIS layers.

name: Salyut
description: Fans out queries to multiple independent free LLMs from different providers and returns their answers side by side, enabling sanity-checking of decisions or getting multiple perspectives during coding sessions.

name: Kontrol
description: A self-hosted MCP server that enables AI coding agents to read, edit, search, and run code in local projects with human review loops and policy controls.

name: Agnes Media MCP Server
description: A local MCP server for Claude Desktop that integrates Agnes Image 2.1 Flash and Agnes Video V2.0, enabling natural language generation of images and videos with automatic local saving.

name: aftr
description: Enables AI agents to control Adobe After Effects to create videos programmatically, with commands for comps, layers, effects, and rendering.

name: Confluence MCP Server
description: Enables reading, searching, creating, updating, and deleting Confluence pages and managing spaces via natural language, with automatic Markdown conversion.

name: Mihomo MCP Server
description: 基于MCP协议的Mihomo/Clash Meta代理节点管理服务，允许AI助手自动管理代理节点、订阅、服务控制和内核版本。

name: agent-herder
description: Unified MCP interface to monitor and control coding agents across OpenCode, Claude Code, and Codex CLI.

name: Maestro MCP Server
description: Produce complete videos from a natural-language brief with Maestro through the Ace Data Cloud API.

name: hybrid-recall
description: A local MCP server enabling hybrid search over documents, memory, and knowledge graphs for retrieval-augmented generation, with tools for SQLite, semantic memory, and entity-relationship queries.

name: Options Analysis Suite MCP Server
description: Enables AI assistants to access options analysis data, market research tools, portfolio risk snapshots, and platform context via 32 tools.

name: mcp-box
description: Isolated Docker sandboxes for MCP servers. Read-only root, zero capabilities, network-none by default.

name: cambium
description: Knowledge-lifecycle MCP: turn agent work into memory, recall it across projects

name: context-keeper
description: Durable project-memory MCP: decisions, constraints, and pipelines across Claude sessions

name: Jmpy mcp server
description: User can create short urls, edit short urls, get click analytics, generate qr codes and much more.

name: BreckenWander Travel
description: A keyless, read-only MCP connector for BreckenWander, an independent travel platform. It searches flights, hotels, and experiences at all-in prices — every mandatory tax and fee included — and returns a link to complete the booking on breckenwander.com.

name: mingtu-ai
description: An AI apprentice system that allows users to train AI through demonstration, correction, and review, with structured task execution and emphasis on packaging design workflow.

name: truepng-mcp
description: Recovers genuine transparency from images with painted checkerboard backgrounds, outputting RGBA PNGs with proper alpha channels. Supports CLI and MCP stdio server for macOS.

name: agent-checkpoint-mcp
description: A local MCP server that saves work-in-progress checkpoints to SQLite, enabling AI agents to resume interrupted sessions without redoing work.

name: Google Ads MCP
description: Enables reading and modifying Google Ads accounts, including campaign management, ad status changes, budget updates, and more.

name: Small-Model Harness MCP
description: Provides context management, task classification, and routing tools for small models (1B-12B) in production agentic workflows.

name: data-breach-detector
description: A read-only breach-intelligence MCP server that checks domain breaches, provides recent breach news, and assesses threat text from public feeds.

name: companycam-mcp
description: Enables managing CompanyCam projects, photos, tags, comments, and users through natural language, using the CompanyCam API.

name: mcp-nychousing
description: MCP server for NYC housing data, enabling tenant organizers and legal-aid intakes to pull building violations, complaints, ownership, litigation, and evictions. It wraps six city datasets from NYC Open Data.
